untranslatable_reason: Signal specifies two alternative configurations (rsi_14 with 70-30 zones OR rsi_10 with 80-20 zones). Available indicators only include rsi_7, rsi_14, rsi_21 — rsi_10 is not available. Cannot fully represent the dual-parameter strategy without rsi_10. Implemented compromise using rsi_14 only with both threshold pairs as alternative entry conditions.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_9 requires flexibility between two RSI configurations. Used rsi_14 (available) for standard setup with 70-30 zones. The frequent-trade variant (rsi_10 with 80-20 zones) cannot be precisely implemented due to lack of rsi_10 indicator. Configured entry_long and entry_short as OR conditions to allow either threshold to trigger. Exit conditions set to reverse the entry signals (standard mean reversion logic). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect that both long and short signals are valid depending on RSI position.
